---
title: California housing prices prediction(Hands on ML)
author: wangxuan
date: '2021-06-10'
slug: index.zh-cn
categories:
  - learn
  - python
  - ML
tags:
  - learn
  - python
description: ~
image: ML.png
math: ~
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(knitr)  
library(reticulate)  
knitr::knit_engines$set(python = reticulate::eng_python)  
```

```{python}
import os
import tarfile
from six.moves import urllib
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
```

```{python}
def load_housing_data(housing_path):
    csv_path = os.path.join(housing_path, "housing.csv")
    return pd.read_csv(csv_path)
```

加载数据

```{python}
housing = load_housing_data(housing_path="C://Users/97440/Documents/GitHub/blog/content/post/2021-06-10-california-housing-prices-prediction-hands-on-ml/")

housing.head()
```

```{python}
housing.info()
```

可以看到出了`ocean_proximity`其他的格式都是`float`，下面看一下该列的具体情况。

```{python}
housing["ocean_proximity"].value_counts()
```

是一个分类变量，一共有四类。

再看一下数据整体的分布情况:

```{python}
housing.describe()
```

除了这些函数之外，观察数据的另一个有效的办法就是画图，图片一般来说会更加直观。

```{python}
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

housing.hist(bins=50, figsize=(20, 15))
plt.show()
```
